underlying_goal: Upgrade Laravel 10 project to Laravel 12 and update all dependencies to their latest compatible versions
friction_detail: Reviewer subagent failed during dependency update phase, requiring user to intervene and redirect the assistant
brief_summary: User wanted to plan and execute a Laravel 10→12 upgrade followed by comprehensive dependency updates; major upgrade completed successfully but reviewer subagent failure caused friction during dependency phase.
user_instructions_to_assistant: usa la skill architect y subagentes para la tarea
usa subagentes para que te ayuden con todo
solo dependencias, no actualices laravel a 13
